narrative:
Englewood-G (precinct in Montgomery County) has 944 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.4 percentage points.
